title: Electric Train Sets for Boys Girls Metal Alloy Christmas Toys Steam Locomotive, Passenger Carriages, Tracks, Light & Sounds Rechargeable Birthday Gifts for Kids 3 4 5 6 7 8 + Years Old Green…
features: 🚂🎄【Upgraded Super Value USB Rechargeable Christmas Train Set】: This train set features 1 all-alloy locomotive steam engine, 1 coal carriage, and 2 passenger carriages with lights, 8 curved tracks, and 4 straight tracks. The 51.2'' (L) x 30.7'' (W) long oval layout of the track provides a pleasant journey. A fully charged battery (in about 210 minutes) will last for approximately 210 minutes of usage.

👍✨【Durable Alloy Build, Safe & High-Quality】: The locomotive steam engine is crafted from premium alloy materials, while the other parts are made of sturdy ABS plastic. This combination makes the train set more durable, impact-resistant, and stable on the tracks, reducing the risk of derailment—unlike flimsy, all-plastic, battery-powered trains. Certified to meet U.S. toy safety standards, this train set ensures a secure and enjoyable playtime for kids and families alike.

🚟🎶【Realistic Headlight, Sounds & Smoke】: This electric train set features realistic train sounds, working headlights, and realistic smoke, creating an authentic train experience. The locomotive train is equipped with a whistle sound and light and smoke function. The passenger carriages are filled with warm light, making our electric train sets more realistic and fun.

💝⚙【Firm Assembly and Versatile Play】: The modular rail track parts can be assembled into your own railroad shape and layout, making it suitable for most family Christmas trees and any table during the festival. The auxiliary slide rail helps place the train on the track smoothly, and once you turn on the switch, the kids' train set will move steadily on the toy track. It's perfect for imaginative and fun playtime.

🗽🏰【 Four Randomly Jigsaw Puzzles】: Take the train on a magical adventure around the world and discover famous landmarks such as the Pyramid, Dutch windmill, Eiffel Tower, and more. Each train comes with four randomly matched puzzles, inspiring endless exploration and learning. It's the perfect gift for kids who love trains and adventure.
